messages.content: dont translate just convert into hinglish font....अब आपने कभी यह किया?ही नहीं तो यह।जिया तो हमने है ही। अगर आप देखो कि पहले तो शौक और फिर अच्छा हुआ कि मतलब तो बोल रहा है। नहीं ये बोल क्यों रहा है? ये तो गुमां था ना। मैं आंसू गिरो ये मुझे।सब आता है। मैं एक्सपर्ट हूँ। मैं एक्सपर्ट हूँ।बहुत बड़ा मीम बन चुका है।हां।आपके दिमाग में क्या चल रहा है? बॉडी लैंग्वेज जेनरेट करने के लिए हागी।लड़की अगर पहलवान है तो उठाकर पटकने की भी तो कोई समस्या नहीं है। ये भूल रही।है भूल भुलैया।ये ये केमिस्ट्री।नहीं।ये हमारा एक्चुअली इस तरीके का ही रिश्ता है। मतलब एक दूसरे को तो हमेशा एफर्ट को बीच में ही भूल जाते। दो एक्टर काम कर रहे हैं।

ab aapne kabhi yah kiya? hee nahin to yah. jiya to hamne hai hee. agar aap dekho ki pahle to shauk aur fir achha hua ki matlab to bol raha hai. nahin ye bol kyon raha hai? ye to gumaan tha na. main aansu giro ye mujhe. sab aata hai. main expert hoon. main expert hoon. bahut bada meme ban chuka hai. haan. aapke dimag mein kya chal raha hai? body language generate karne ke liye haagi. ladki agar pahalwan hai to uthakar patkne ki bhi to koi samasya nahin hai. ye bhool rahi. hai bhool bhulaiya. ye ye chemistry. nahin. ye hamara actually is tarah ka hee rishta hai. matlab ek dusre ko to hamesha efort ko beech mein hee bhool jaate. do actor kaam kar rahe hain.

as this is transcript of my youtube shorts made from rajpal yadav podcast with ranveer allahbadia in which ranveer showed rajpal yadav his trending memes and asked about that now make a catchy strong seo under 70 char with atlest 3 keywords title for youtube shorts
"Rajpal Yadav Reacts to Memes with Ranveer | Viral Podcast Clip"
use at least 2 keywords
"Rajpal Yadav on Ranveer's Show | Trending Memes Reaction"
#keywords

If you are looking for a title that includes specific keywords and adheres to your SEO criteria, consider using keywords such as "Rajpal Yadav," "Ranveer Allahbadia," "Podcast," and "Memes." Here's a title that fits the 70-character limit and includes at least two keywords:

"Rajpal On Memes: Ranveer's Podcast | Yadav's Trending Shorts"

Remember that the '#' symbol is not typically used within YouTube video titles, so I've omitted it, but you can include keywords for tagging and description purposes to help with SEO.
use in title #
"Rajpal Responds Memes - Ranveer Podcast Highlights #YadavMemes"
suggest some no copyrisght music names for this topic suggest names

When choosing no copyright music for your YouTube videos, it's important to ensure the music is indeed royalty-free or available under Creative Commons licenses, and you abide by the terms set by the music's creator. 1. "Sunny Days" by Scott Holmes Music
2. "Feel Good" by MusicbyAden

4. "Comedy Quirky Loop" by Yung Koolade (available on YouTube Audio Library)
5. "Uplifting Dreams" by LesFM
6. "Happy Whistle" by Nicolai Heidlas
7. "Jazz Comedy" by Bensound
8. "Energetic Upbeat Pop Summer" by AlexGrohl
9. "Go Lucky" by chasersgaming (available on YouTube Audio Library)

Remember to read the licensing information for each track carefully. Some tracks may be free to use but require attribution, while others don't even need that. You can find royalty-free music on platforms like YouTube Audio Library, Free Music Archive, Bensound, or PremiumBeat, where you can search for tracks that fit the mood of your video content.
suggest indian

related to topic

For a YouTube short that features highlights of Rajpal Yadav reacting to memes from his podcast with Ranveer Allahbadia, you'll want music that is playful, light-hearted, and carries an Indian flavor to complement Rajpal Yadav's persona. Here are some suggestions:

1. "Chutney Soca Bounce" by Doug Maxwell/Media Right Productions (available on YouTube Audio Library) – This is a happy, upbeat track with an Indian-Caribbean fusion vibe.

2. "Lucknow" by Silent Partner (available on YouTube Audio Library) – A track that has an Indian classical influence mixed with modern beats, suitable for creating a humorous and engaging atmosphere.

3. "Bollywood Nights" by Quincas Moreira (available on YouTube Audio Library) – This track has a modern Bollywood pop feel that can add a playful and energetic tone to your video.

4. "The Emperor’s Army" by Jeremy Blake (available on YouTube Audio Library) – While not strictly Indian, it has a rhythmic and mystical quality that could pair well with humorous content.

5. "Sitar in the Sky" by Audio Hertz (available on YouTube Audio Library) – An easy-going track with sitar sounds that could work well as a backdrop to conversation highlights or meme reactions.

Remember to search for these tracks on YouTube Audio Library or the respective royalty-free music platform to ensure they're still available for use without copyright restrictions. Always check the licensing details for the proper usage and crediting instructions.
more

For additional royalty-free Indian-inspired music options that could suit the mood of your YouTube short with Rajpal Yadav's podcast moments, here are some more suggestions you can consider:

1. "Jalandhar" by Kevin MacLeod - A peppy and playful track featuring Indian classical instruments, perfect for light-hearted content.

2. "Delhi Belly" by Slynk (available on YouTube Audio Library) - An upbeat, energetic track with a strong Indian vibe and electronic elements that could add a modern, lively feel to your content.

3. "Kalimba Relaxation Music" by Kevin MacLeod - Featuring the kalimba, an African instrument, but with a melodic tune that can blend well with a variety of content, including light-hearted discussions and reactions.

4. "Indian Dance" by RYT (available on Free Music Archive) - Upbeat and bright, this track can inject a fun and authentic Indian atmosphere into your shorts.

5. "Mumbai Mood" by Aakash Gandhi (available on YouTube Audio Library) - An uplifting and dynamic track that could complement energetic and amusing parts of your video.

6. "Beachfront Celebration" by Kevin MacLeod - This track offers a festive and celebratory mood with tropical vibes that might pair well with humourous and upbeat content.

7. "Eastern Thought" by Kevin MacLeod - A more subdued and traditional track that uses classical Indian instruments, suitable for relaxed or thoughtful moments.

8. "Exotic Battle" by Kevin MacLeod - This track combines epic cinematic elements with ethnic instruments, creating a playful battlefield ambiance, which might suit a meme review segment.

Before using any of these tracks, please visit their respective platforms to ensure they are still available without copyright restrictions, and follow the appropriate usage guidelines, which may include providing credit to the artist.

cathy description with strong seo keywords

"Dive into a laughter riot as the iconic Rajpal Yadav joins Ranveer Allahbadia for an unforgettable podcast session. Watch as Rajpal humorously reacts to viral memes created from his most memorable roles, showcasing the lighter side of this beloved Bollywood actor. #RajpalYadav, known for his impeccable comic timing, gives us a peek into his ability to laugh at himself while reminiscing over his cinematic journey. Don't miss out on this trending mashup of fun, nostalgia, and candid moments in our latest #YouTubeShorts. Hit play for a dose of entertainment and witness the meme magic that has the internet buzzing. Subscribe for more such hilarious interactions and behind-the-scenes #Bollywood insights. #RanveerPodcast #MemeReview #ActorReacts #ComedyKing #Entertainment"

This description incorporates several SEO-friendly keywords such as Rajpal Yadav, viral memes, Bollywood, Ranveer Podcast, YouTube Shorts, meme review, actor reacts, comedy, and entertainment, aiming to improve visibility on YouTube search and suggested video recommendations.
